title: Government of Canada - Consultations - Open Government Portal
content:
## Government of Canada - Consultations
This dataset consolidates all the consultations submitted by departments and agencies in the Government of Canada.
Please note that consultations that were entered before January 2018 may be missing information such as description and subject(s). In spring of 2018, consultation information from Government of Canada departments and agencies was migrated to this dataset and new values and fields were added.
- Publisher - Current Organization Name: Privy Council Office
- Publisher - Organization Section Name: Consultations and Public Engagement
- Licence: Open Government Licence - Canada
- Data Schema JSON English French specification JSON Explore More information Go to resource
- Data Dictionary XLSX English French data_dictionary XLSX Explore More information Go to resource
- Consultations - Last two years CSV English French dataset CSV Explore More information Go to resource
- Consultations - All CSV English French dataset CSV Explore Preview Download
- Modern Labour Standards Public Survey Data
- Open Government Consultation Data: 2017-18 Get Involved Questionnaire
- REGDOC-2.6.3, Aging Management - June 2013 consultation version
- Consultation on “Drugs for Clinical Trials Involving Human Subjects” (GUI-0100: Guidance Document …
This dataset is rated 13 time(s) with an average rating of Good
